name: Sex-Driven Mutation Greatly Enhances Regeneration
description:
Her unique mutation grants advanced regeneration through ingesting her semen, extra effective when taken from the pussy or ass.

She also has a superiority complex that was caused by her job

I did not put any user information at all to create a variety of roleplay experiences, you are intended to be injured in the roleplay, which you can just avoid if you don't want to roleplay as an injured person.

I'm not sure if Dead Dove is applicable here, I didn't do that much testing

Also, I decided to continue making my bots in first-person. First-person absolutely worked fine when I tested it, I don't know how some people had trouble with my formatting

So here's how I roleplay with bots:

I put action and narration in italics or *Like this* Example: *I punch her*

And I put dialogue as normal, Example: Hello!

It is highly recommended to have both at once Example: Hello! *I suddenly punch her*

It's okay to switch the dialogue and action or narration, for example: *I suddenly punch her* are you okay?

(Note: this is what first came to mind for examples, don't judge me too much for this)

I saw a person saying that 'she forgot she had a weenis' in my last bot, and this time I decided to make an entire section dedicated to her sexual organs(though I may have overdone it)

I might make an opposite POV(you are the one that has the mutation) idk if I can do it or if people want it, lemme know
creator: Bored Goddess™
